rawIntent: The file src/modules/leave/leave.controller.ts (or the intent specification that generates it) imports ILeaveService from './leave.service.interface'. However, the ILeaveService interface is exported from './leave.service' as per the phase architecture. The import path is wrong, causing a module not found error. Fix the import to use './leave.service'. Preserve all existing exports, types, interfaces, and imports. Only add or modify what is needed to resolve the CI failure shown above.

successCriteria.description: The import statement for ILeaveService in src/modules/leave/leave.controller.ts uses the correct path './leave.service'.

constraints: No reverse dependencies (leave module must not import from modules that depend on it)
outOfScope: Any other files in the project
Any changes to business logic, tests, or configuration
Any changes to the ILeaveService interface or its implementation
Any changes to other imports in leave.controller.ts
